svg.text: CALIBRATION SCOPE · HUMAN FAILURE MODES · vol.1
what happens to your AI — happening to you.

g.text: “Doc — I've had this headache for days now.”
‹ middle — the part that actually matters ›
Allergic to ibuprofen. Concussion three years back.
Mom had aneurysms. Four hours' sleep since the layoffs.
② WHAT THE DOCTOR ACTUALLY HEARD
Allergic to ibuprofen · concussion · aneurysms · no sleep
✂ 2,847 words — silently dropped on the floor
That grey box is a context window overflowing. Your AI does it on
every long chat: it keeps your hello, keeps your goodbye —
and quietly drops the middle, where you actually live.
TRUNCATE MIDDLE — one of the most evil things in modern AI. Evil to knowledge, that is.
Remember someone truncating your middle, leaving out your context?
Congratulations — you've officially met your AI.
the toggle that silently eats your middle
